mechanism: Integrate empirical correlations across multiple studies using random-effects meta-analysis with artifact correction for measurement error and sampling error. Correct observed correlations for unreliability in predictors and criteria, estimate construct-level correlations with confidence intervals, and evaluate moderators via comparison of non-overlapping confidence intervals.

Perform Bayesian inference to learn word meanings from limited positive examples by integrating prior knowledge about category structure with observed exemplars. Compute posterior probability of word extension using Bayesian model comparison across competing hypotheses about conceptual categories.

Recruit exemplars and construct counterfactual alternatives via distributed associative activation. Compute norms as normalized aggregates of activated element features, comparing stimuli to post-hoc constructed reference sets. Determine normality by measuring relative availability of alternatives to experienced events.

Compare outcome probabilities across foresight and hindsight conditions by asking subjects to estimate likelihood of experimental results replicating. Measure conditional probability bias as difference in mean replication estimates. Manipulate availability of alternative explanations to isolate hindsight effect mechanism.

Assess calibration of confidence judgments by comparing subjective certainty assignments to objective correctness across binary questions. Compute accuracy rates for specified probability or odds levels. Test through multiple response formats and correct-answer gambling games to validate commitment to confidence estimates.

Elicit risk preference via within-subjects choice between fixed risky option and varying sure amounts, computing a risk-preference index based on switching point. Compare self risk preference to predicted others' preference using paired design. Examine moderation by target vividness (abstract vs concrete) via between-subjects conditions.
